parameters.text:
=Classify this customer email for Metabelly (Croatian gut health brand - fiber supplements, microbiome analysis).

Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no other text, no markdown, no explanation:
{
  "category": "FAQ|MEDICAL|ORDER|BUSINESS",
  "priority": "P1|P2|P3",
  "language": "HR|EN",
  "summary": "one sentence in English",
  "requires_human": true|false,
  "suggested_action": "short action",
  "auto_reply": "reply text or empty string"
}

Rules:
- requires_human=false and auto_reply ONLY when the customer asks a SPECIFIC, CLEAR question about ingredients, dosage, or delivery that can be answered factually. Set category=FAQ, priority=P3.
- If the email is a contact form submission, general message, newsletter signup, automated notification, or does NOT contain a direct question — set requires_human=true, auto_reply=""
- If unsure whether to auto-reply, always set requires_human=true, auto_reply=""
- MEDICAL (IBS, pain, disease, symptoms, medical conditions) = P2, requires_human=true, auto_reply=""
- ORDER (shipping, payment, returns, orders) = P2, requires_human=true, auto_reply=""
- BUSINESS (partnerships, wholesale, press, collaboration) = P2, requires_human=true, auto_reply=""
- P1 only for medical emergencies

Email to classify:
{{ $json.body }}

parameters.name: text
